summary: Phase 15 Customer Case Portal + Proposal/File Sharing Hub - All features working correctly. Backend APIs tested via pytest (10 passed, 7 skipped due to RM having no leads in pipeline). Frontend tested via Playwright - customer portal (/my-cases, /my-cases/:caseId) and RM Portal tab in ConversionCaseDetail all functional.

success_rate.backend: 100% (10 passed, 7 skipped - skips due to RM having no leads in pipeline, not failures)

seed_data_creation: Test data already exists: lead_21668ed1ecd9 has shared items (superseded v1 quote, current v2 quote, revoked shortlist). Customer has responded 'interested' to quotes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 15 Customer Case Portal fully tested. Customer login flow: /login -> click 'Customer Sign In' -> /auth -> click 'Sign in with password instead' -> fill credentials. RM login: /team/login -> fill credentials. Customer portal at /my-cases shows case list with event type, city, stage, RM name. Case detail at /my-cases/:caseId has 3 tabs (Shared Items, Timeline, Contact RM). RM Portal tab in ConversionCaseDetail shows engagement summary (shared/viewed/responded/pending counts), Share to Customer button, and Share History with lifecycle states.

customer_portal.my_cases_page: PASS - Shows 4 case cards with event type, city, stage, RM name, pending actions badge
customer_portal.case_detail_page: PASS - Shows 3 tabs (Shared Items, Timeline, Contact RM)
customer_portal.shared_items_tab: PASS - Shows share cards with lifecycle badges (viewed, responded), version badge (v2)
customer_portal.contact_rm_tab: PASS - Shows RM info (Ravi Sharma) and 5 action buttons
customer_portal.respond_modal: PASS - Opens when clicking Respond button with structured options

rm_portal_tab.portal_tab_visible: PASS - Shows in tab bar with badge icon
rm_portal_tab.engagement_summary: PASS - Shows 3 SHARED, 2 VIEWED, 2 RESPONDED, 0 PENDING
rm_portal_tab.share_to_customer_button: PASS - Opens modal with Share Type, Title, Description, Customer Note fields
rm_portal_tab.share_history: PASS - Shows 4 shares with lifecycle states (viewed, responded, superseded, revoked)
rm_portal_tab.version_badges: PASS - v2 badge on current version, OLD badge on superseded

backend_apis.GET /api/case-portal/my-cases: PASS - Returns customer cases with correct access control
backend_apis.GET /api/case-portal/cases/{lead_id}: PASS - Returns case detail with shares and timeline
backend_apis.POST /api/case-portal/{lead_id}/share: PASS - Creates share with version handling
backend_apis.GET /api/case-portal/{lead_id}/engagemen: PASS - Returns engagement summary for RM
backend_apis.GET /api/case-portal/{lead_id}/shares: PASS - Returns all shares including revoked/superseded
